facts_disclosed: Camry plan dead — car got sold

turns.content: remember that camry i was looking at
A Camry? No, fill me in — what's going on with it?
i was gonna buy this used camry bro. been going back and forth with the seller for like 2 weeks trying to get my loan approved
Oh okay, so you had a deal lined up. What happened with the loan?
its gone bro. dude sold it to someone else while i was waiting on the loan
Are you serious? While you were still working things out with him?
nah wallahi he just texted me like oh sorry someone came with cash. like bro i was working on getting approved for 2 weeks
That's messed up. He couldn't even give you a heads up that someone else was looking at it? That's just disrespectful of your time.
exactly bro. and now i been looking at other listings and everything in that price range got like 150k miles on it. not worth it
Yeah at 150k+ you're basically buying someone else's problems. Especially if you're putting a lot of miles on it yourself, that's a recipe for expensive repairs.
i been looking. forget about that whole thing bro its dead. the camry plan is done
So you're scrapping the whole idea for now?
yeah the whole camry plan is dead for now. just gonna keep what i got running and stack up more. inshallah something better comes later
That sounds like the smart move honestly. No point rushing into a high-mileage car that's gonna cost you more in repairs. Keep stacking and when the right one shows up you'll be ready.
yeah exactly. just gotta be patient wallahi
For real. The right deal will come when the time is right. No sense forcing it.
